reference: I would suggest that there are no specific symptoms indicating whether you are having a boy or a girl baby. For a normal delivery to occur, there will be abdominal pain, reddish discharge, followed by watery discharge and the onset of uterine contractions.
text: I would suggest that there are no specific symptoms indicating whether you are having a boy or a girl baby. For a normal delivery to occur, there will be abdominal pain, reddish discharge, followed by watery discharge and the onset of uterine contractions.
